response.justification: Candidate has approximately 14-16 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices domains, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role. However, the role requires Principal/Director-level IC scope with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud strategy leadership — none of which are substantively evidenced. AI experience is limited to a few months of tooling work, there is no advanced degree in an AI field, and prior roles are senior IC rather than principal/strategic scope. Background is solid full-stack engineering but does not match the AI strategy leadership bar.
strengths: ~15 years of hands-on engineering across full stack, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open source maintainership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators/frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms shipped at scale; AI work is recent and limited in scope
No evidence of Principal/Director-level IC influence, cloud strategy advisory, or external thought leadership in AI
No advanced degree in AI and no entrepreneurial/intrapreneurial track record described
